articles.author: ahmedobaidi
articles.description:
Hi HN! I built ggRMCP, a Go-based gateway that lets AI models call your existing gRPC services without any code changes.The core idea: most companies have tons of gRPC services, but connecting them to AI tools requires building custom integrations. ggRMCP bridges this gap by translating between gRPC and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), so Claude or OpenAI can discover and call your services as if they were native tools.
